promise: Free bus travel for women across Tamil Nadu
notes: Scheme launched in May 2021, providing free bus rides for all women in government buses across the state.

promise: ₹1,000 monthly assistance for women heads of households
notes: Launched in September 2021, the scheme provides monthly financial assistance to women heads of households.
Loan waiver scheme announced in February 2022, implementation ongoing.
